# Copilot Instructions

This project uses structured instruction files.

Additional rules are defined in:
- .github/instructions/context-engineering.instructions.md
- .github/instructions/meta-agent.instructions.md

# Project Instructions

Follow all rules in .github/instructions/

ALWAYS use `rtk` for:
- git
- npm
- mvn
- docker
- gradlew

Do not output full logs unless necessary.
